watcher_archetypes.label: Clip-First Viewer
watcher_archetypes.description: Discovers the movie through short-form clips before watching the full feature.
watcher_archetypes.metadata_notes: Treat as cultural discovery path, not user identity.

watcher_archetypes.label: Lore Diver
watcher_archetypes.description: Follows timelines, canon, fan theories, and expanded universes.
watcher_archetypes.metadata_notes: Best matched with franchise maps and spoiler-safe summaries.

watcher_archetypes.label: Theater Event Builder
watcher_archetypes.description: Treats release night as a shared IRL event.
watcher_archetypes.metadata_notes: Supports positive group viewing without collecting personal attendance.

watcher_archetypes.label: Comfort Rewatcher
watcher_archetypes.description: Returns to movies for mood, routine, and shared memory.
watcher_archetypes.metadata_notes: Use as metadata for recommendation tone, not behavioral scoring.

watcher_archetypes.label: Family Bridge Viewer
watcher_archetypes.description: Uses blockbusters as a bridge across generations and households.
watcher_archetypes.metadata_notes: Primary boundary: family environment stays respected.

blockbuster_categories.watch_loop: trailer awe -> group watch -> reaction clips -> sequel speculation
family entry -> soundtrack loop -> meme scenes -> repeat viewing
nostalgia hook -> lore compare -> merch/meta discussion -> sequel watch
concept shock -> theory threads -> repo notes -> symbolic replay

project_fish_use.not_catch: people, private identities, minors, private behavior, or hidden profiles
project_fish_use.anchor_candidate: jaywisdom.base.eth metadata mesh pending explicit attestation
